# files_event_channel (Resource)

An EventChannel is a named grouping of EventSubscriptions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "files_event_channel" "example_event_channel" {
  name            = "example"
  description     = "example"
  enabled         = true
  default_channel = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Event Channel name.

### Optional

- `default_channel` (Boolean) Whether this Event Channel is the default destination for newly published events.
- `description` (String) Event Channel description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this Event Channel can dispatch events.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Event Channel create date/time.
- `id` (Number) Event Channel ID
- `updated_at` (String) Event Channel update date/time.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Event Channels can be imported by specifying the id.
terraform import files_event_channel.example_event_channel 1
```
